title: Preachers SMP Pack (1.16)
description: Doctor Who based pack centered around the New TARDIS Mod, made for Pr/Sneachers SMP.
body:
Official modpack of the Preachers/Sneachers SMP. Centered around the New TARDIS Mod, this pack allows y'all to get just a little bit more Doctor Who in your life. Plus exploration through Twilight Forest and BOP, QOL improvements with FallingTree and Hwyla, and even more tech with the Thermals, Tinkers', and Refined Storage.

Uses [Camera Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camera-mod) by henkelmax and [Just Enough Resources](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer) by way2muchnoise. Also uses [Inventory Pets version 2.0.20](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-pets/files/4950569) and [Twilight Forest version 4.0.870](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest/files/3575220), which you'll have to download manually. Sorry.
